---
title: "ACE Project continuous"
author: "Caleb"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

## Load trees

```{R}
library(treats)
trees <- read.tree("../Data/trees/simulated.tre")

```


## Now simulating continuous characters

```{r}
## BM process

source("../Functions/fossil.pres.R")

bm <- make.traits(process = BM.process, n = 100)
ou <- make.traits(process = OU.process, n = 100)
random_cont <- make.traits(process = no.process, n = 100)

bm_matrices <- lapply(trees, function(tree){
    mapped <- map.traits(bm, tree)
    matrix <- mapped$data
    return(matrix)
})
ou_matrices <- lapply(trees, function(tree){
    mapped <- map.traits(ou, tree)
    matrix <- mapped$data
    return(matrix)
})
random_cont_matrices <- lapply(trees, function(tree){
    mapped <- map.traits(random_cont, tree)
    matrix <- mapped$data
    return(matrix)
}) 
continuous_matrices <- list(bm = bm_matrices, ou = ou_matrices)

living_cont <- lapply(continuous_matrices, remove.fossil, trees = trees, type = "continuous")
fossilised_high_cont <- lapply(continuous_matrices, fossil.pres, trees = trees, preservation = 0.5, type = "continuous")
fossilised_med_cont <- lapply(continuous_matrices, fossil.pres, trees = trees, preservation = 0.15, type = "continuous")
fossilised_low_cont <- lapply(continuous_matrices, fossil.pres, trees = trees, preservation = 0.05, type = "continuous")


fossil_levels_cont <- list(living = living_cont, fossil_high = fossilised_high_cont, fossil_med = fossilised_med_cont, fossil_low = fossilised_low_cont)


fossil_matrices_cont <- lapply(names(continuous_matrices), function(level) {
  lapply(names(fossil_levels_cont), function(fossil_type) {
    fossil_levels_cont[[fossil_type]][[level]]
  })
})

names(fossil_matrices_cont) <- names(continuous_matrices)
for (level in names(fossil_matrices_cont)) {
  names(fossil_matrices_cont[[level]]) <- names(fossil_levels_cont)
}

```

## Continuous pipeline

```{r}

# traitspace_cont <- pca.func(continuous_matrices)

# disp_obj_cont <- lapply(traitspace_cont, make.dispRity, tree = tree)


# time_sliced_cont <- lapply(disp_obj_cont, do.time.slice, chrono_models = chrono_models, time_interval = 10)

# bootstrapped_cont <- lapply(time_sliced_cont, lapply, boot.matrix, bootstraps = 100)

# disparity_cont <- lapply(bootstrapped_cont, lapply,  dispRity, metric = c(sum, variances), na.rm = TRUE, verbose = TRUE)

# saveRDS(disparity_cont, "../Data/processed/disparity/aceproject/beckcont.Rds")
# saveRDS(disparity_cont, "../Data/processed/disparity/aceproject/simcont.Rds")


# plot(disparity_cont$ou$proximity)

```

## ace continuous

```{r}

anc.states <- function(fossil_matrices_cont){
  lapply(fossil_matrices_cont, function(level){
    lapply(level, function(x) {
  # Run multi.ace for each tree
  anc_states <- multi.ace(data = x$matrix, 
                          tree = x$tree, 
                          models = "BM", 
                          output = "combined",
                          verbose = TRUE)
  return(anc_states)})})}


fossil_anc <- lapply(fossil_matrices_cont, anc.states)
saveRDS(fossil_anc, "../Data/matrices/contanc.Rds")
fossil_anc <- readRDS("../Data/matrices/contanc.Rds")

```

## Measure raw euclidean distance

```{R}

get.nodes <- function(true, ace){
  node_v <- rownames(ace)[grepl("^n", rownames(ace))] # vector of nodes
  ace_filtered <- ace[node_v, ] #filter ace so that only nodes left in matrix
  true_filtered <- true[node_v, ] # filter true matrix so only nodes left in matrix
  return(list(ace = ace_filtered, true = true_filtered))
}

true_vs_ace <- lapply(names(continuous_matrices), function(level) {
  level_result <- lapply(names(fossil_levels), function(preservation) {
    result <- Map(function(true_matrix, ace_matrix) {
      get.nodes(true_matrix, ace_matrix)
    }, continuous_matrices[[level]], fossil_anc[[level]][[preservation]])
    names(result) <- names(continuous_matrices[[level]])  # Preserve names at this level
    return(result)
  })
  names(level_result) <- names(fossil_levels)  # Preserve names for preservation levels
  return(level_result)
})
names(true_vs_ace) <- names(continuous_matrices)

binded_matrices <- lapply(true_vs_ace, function(preservation) {
  lapply(preservation, function(rates) {
    lapply(rates, function(matrices) {
      rownames(matrices$ace) <- paste0("ace", rownames(matrices$ace))
      matrices <- rbind(matrices$ace, matrices$true)
      return(matrices)  # Return the modified matrices
    })
  })
})
plot(binded_matrices$bm$fossil_low[[1]])
text(binded_matrices$bm$fossil_low[[1]], labels = rownames(binded_matrices$bm$fossil_low[[1]]), pos = 4, cex = 0.6)

morphospace.dist <- function(binded_matrices){
  ace_scores <- binded_matrices[grepl("^ace", rownames(binded_matrices)), ]
  true_scores <- binded_matrices[!grepl("^ace", rownames(binded_matrices)), ]
  distances <- sqrt(rowSums((ace_scores - true_scores)^2))
  return(distances)
}

morpho_dists <- lapply(binded_matrices, lapply, lapply, morphospace.dist)

morpho_dists_ou <- unlist(morpho_dists$ou)

categories <- c("living", "fossil_high", "fossil_med", "fossil_low")
morpho_dists_ou <- split(morpho_dists_ou, gsub("\\d+", "", names(morpho_dists_ou)))
boxplot(morpho_dists_ou, 
        main = "", 
        ylab = "", 
        xlab = "Categories", 
        las = 2)




```
